title: Implement TopologicalWavesAcrossParents
description:
New function in internal/graph/cross_parent_waves.go. Computes parallelizable waves across multiple parent issues by:
1. Collecting all leaf tasks (no children) under rootID or all open tasks
2. If cascade=true, finding parent-level blocks deps and injecting synthetic task-level edges using the blocking frontier (dependency-graph sinks within blocker subtree)
3. Blocker normalization: if blocker has no descendants use it directly, if it has descendants use its sinks, if outside set warn and skip
4. Running existing TopologicalWaves on the expanded edge set

Returns waves and a lookup map of ID→Issue. See GRAPH_AND_CASCADE_DESIGN.md 'Cross-Parent Topological Waves' and 'Blocking Frontier' sections. Include comprehensive unit tests.
